note: Package name pptx_cli supports CLI name pptx by avoiding namespace collision
Structured envelope requires stable error codes for the errors array
Structured envelope requires stable exit codes for process-level signaling
Dry-run preview supports the no-silent-degradation principle
Atomic writes prevent silent data corruption that would degrade fidelity
Cloning template structures requires that only approved layouts and placeholders are used
Synchronized doc and test updates require that new behavior ships with tests
Thin command modules support the cli.py boundary by keeping logic out of both
